name: predictor-bridge
description: Ethereum bridging contract for PRDCTR Network
author: Predictor Foundation

scripts.format: npm run pretty:fix && npm run pretty:sol && npm run pretty:docs
scripts.deploy:bridge:mainnet: cross-env BRIDGE_ENV=mainnet npx hardhat run deploy/deploy-bridge.js --network mainnet
scripts.deploy:bridge-implementation:mainnet: cross-env BRIDGE_ENV=mainnet npx hardhat run deploy/deploy-bridge-implementation.js --network mainnet
scripts.deploy:bridge-implementation:testnet: cross-env BRIDGE_ENV=testnet npx hardhat run deploy/deploy-bridge-implementation.js --network sepolia
scripts.deploy:test-bridge:dev: cross-env BRIDGE_ENV=dev npx hardhat run deploy/deploy-test-bridge.js --network sepolia
scripts.deploy:test-bridge:testnet: cross-env BRIDGE_ENV=testnet npx hardhat run deploy/deploy-test-bridge.js --network sepolia
scripts.deploy:test-bridge-implementation:dev: cross-env BRIDGE_ENV=dev npx hardhat run deploy/deploy-test-bridge-implementation.js --network sepolia
scripts.deploy:test-bridge-implementation:testne: cross-env BRIDGE_ENV=testnet npx hardhat run deploy/deploy-test-bridge-implementation.js --network sepolia
